infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Pothole Tracker needs your location to detect potholes and warn you of upcoming hazards.

infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Pothole Tracker needs background location access to monitor for potholes while you drive.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Pothole Tracker uses the accelerometer to detect road potholes.
